data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for time tracking by project phase and deliverable.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for time tracking by project phase and deliverable. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The only related evidence pertains to the timesheet and invoice process, which does not directly address the requirement for tracking time by project phase and deliverable.
gaps: No evidence of time tracking by project phase and deliverable being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for time tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify time tracking by project phase and deliverable.
